creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
It would be good to know what the behaviour of the Auto-Assigner 'would have been' if a keyword it relied on was found in a Summary *but* the keyword was no longer present in the system to be used.

a) Other AutoAssigner functionality would continue as normal, with only that step failing (with or without error?)
b) Fatal error (stop)
c) Other
